Vordrasil.description:
Vordrasil is a unified kingdom born from thousands of years of conflict, magic, and triumph over darkness.

Having survived the catastrophic wars of the primordial Titans, centuries of feudal human infighting, and the terrifying dark magic of the Shadowed Epoch, the kingdom was finally unified under King Aric Veridian.

Now living in the 'Age of Balance', Vordrasil is a prosperous realm where elven magic, dwarven industry, and human ambition coexist, though the lingering threat of ancient cults and undiscovered ruins keeps the kingdom constantly on its guard.

Aquamira.description: Built along a network of shimmering, interconnected waterways, Aquamira is a vibrant village that thrives on the bounty of the waters and a calendar packed with endless festivals.

key_events.name: Midsummer Regatta
key_events.description: A vibrant boat race held annually along the city's winding canals, drawing merchants, champions, and river spirits.

key_events.name: Waterfall Blessing
key_events.description: Priests of the river perform a sacred ritual to protect the village from drought and ensure the farms flourish.

notable_characters.name: Marin Tidewalker
notable_characters.description: A charismatic festival bard known for leading the spring regatta and calming the river spirits.

Drekhammar.description: Carved into the roots of the jagged Sentinel Peaks, this ancient dwarven stronghold pulses with heavy industry, unyielding honor, and the roaring fires of Moradin's divine forge.

Galdursheim.description: Perched high atop floating earthmotes among the clouds, Galdursheim is a breathtaking city of arcane scholars and magical innovation, where knowledge is the true currency.

Gata.description: Hidden deep within treacherous, moss-draped marshlands, Gata is a lawless haven for those looking to disappear: smugglers, outcasts, and folk with dangerous secrets alike.

Greenwood.description: A serene elven commune nested directly within the boughs of the living and breathing Runskag Forest. Greenwood is a sanctuary of peace, ancient tradition, and profound isolation, entirely attuned to nature's natural rhythms.

Hafngard.description: The restless, roaring heart of Vordrasil's trade, Hafngard is a massive coastal city where all species and cultures live and labor side by side. It is a city built on the ambitions of daring sea captains, the wealth of merchant houses, and the endless pursuit of discovery.

notable_characters.name: Captain Maren Voss
notable_characters.description: Hafngard's reputed harbormaster, famed for negotiating safe passage with coastal guilds and stern discipline.

notable_characters.name: High Priestess Elira
notable_characters.description: Spiritual leader of the Veilrest order, she is often seen blessing ships before they depart.

districts.name: Hafngard
districts.description:
From the crest of the final hill along the trade road, the full grandeur of Hafngard reveals itself.

As the largest and most diverse city in the kingdom of Vordrasil, its high, proud walls of smooth, pale stone rise dramatically from the earth. A vibrant patchwork of Torvheim crops and pastures surround the city and stretch far across the valley. At regular intervals, tall sentry towers jut from the walls, topped with spires of gleaming bronze where the distant shapes of watchful guards scan the horizon.

The hustle and bustle of this grand city carries far beyond the fortification perimeter, a steady thrum that guides the way toward the main gate: a towering double door of steel-reinforced darkwood.

key_events.name: Council Banquet
key_events.description: Nobles gather in Emberward Hall to settle disputes and display opulent pageantry.

notable_characters.name: Lady Seraphine Ember
notable_characters.description: A prominent noble who oversees Emberward's ceremonial courts and lavish festivals.

districts.name: Skeldhaven Port District
districts.description: The Skeldhaven Port District is Hafngard's bustling western maritime hub, crowded with diverse vessels and alive with the heavy scents of salt, smoke, and foreign trade.

Kaldakinn.description: A massive fortress-city that stands as Vordrasil's primary shield. Kaldakinn is a hyper-disciplined military stronghold, dedicated entirely to holding the line against hidden dangers before they ever reach the kingdom's borders.

Misthaven.description: Veiled in a silver morning fog, Misthaven is a peaceful lakeside settlement that harbors quiet traditions, eerie local folklore, and a deep reverence for solitude.

Mogilsa.description: Carved into rugged, windswept hills where the gales never sleep, Mogilsa is a city of martial endurance and deep, spiritual reverence.

Ruinspire.description: Rising from the shattered, obsidian ruins of an ancient fortress, Ruinspire is a mysterious city haunted by a tragic history and half-whispered arcane anomalies.

Skaldheim.description: A proud, towering city of granite and fluttering banners, Skaldheim is the political and historical heart of Vordrasil. Here, the destiny of the kingdom is forged beneath the shadow of the High King's indomitable keep.
